descriptions.pagination: Split long texts into fragments for progressive TTS playback

playback.title: Playback Settings
playback.onRetriggerDescription: What happens when TTS is triggered while already speaking

triggers.title: Trigger Settings
triggers.doubleCopyWindowDescription: Time window in which a second copy triggers TTS (100-5000ms)
triggers.maxTextLengthDescription: Maximum characters to speak (longer text will be truncated with a warning)

pagination.title: Pagination Settings
pagination.description: Split long texts into fragments for progressive TTS playback

history.title: History Settings
history.enabledDescription: Keep a log of all TTS operations
history.generationsFolderDescription: Directory to save TTS generations. Leave blank for default.
history.manualCleanupDescription: Run cleanup now to remove old entries and orphaned files

cleanupDialog.title: Run History Cleanup?
cleanupDialog.description: This will enforce current Auto-Delete rules
cleanupDialog.orphanedFiles: Remove orphaned audio files not referenced in history

sanitization.title: Sanitization Settings
sanitization.enabledDescription: Remove unwanted formatting from clipboard text before TTS
sanitization.markdownDescription: Remove all markdown formatting (headers, bold, italic, code blocks, links, lists, blockquotes)
sanitization.ttsNormalizationDescription: Resolve URLs, slashes, abbreviations, metric units, and symbols into spoken-friendly text

effects.enabledDescription: Show the Effects tab in the main menu and apply post-processing to TTS playback
effects.activeDescription: Audio effect applied to every TTS playback

openai.title: OpenAI TTS
openai.detail: CopySpeak uses OpenAI's text-to-speech API for high-quality voice synthesis.

elevenlabs.title: ElevenLabs
elevenlabs.detail: Premium TTS engine with realistic voice cloning capabilities.

kokoro.title: Kokoro TTS
kokoro.detail: Lightweight, open-source text-to-speech engine for local processing.

piper.title: Piper
piper.detail: Fast, local neural text-to-speech system with low latency.

cartesia.title: Cartesia
cartesia.detail: Cloud API powered by the Sonic 3.5 model. Requires an API key.

kitten.title: Kitten TTS
kitten.detail: Default engine. 25-80MB CPU-only ONNX inference with 8 built-in voices, no GPU required.

pocket.title: Pocket TTS
pocket.detail: Local CLI engine with straightforward voice selection.

edge.title: Edge-TTS
edge.detail: Accesses Microsoft's free Read Aloud service via the edge-tts Python library. 400+ neural voices across 50+ languages. No API key needed.

edge.title: Edge-TTS
edge.description: Cloud: Free Microsoft Read Aloud voices (400+ neural voices, 50+ languages). No API key — requires the edge-tts CLI (use Install).

cartesia.title: Cartesia
cartesia.description: Cloud: Low-latency, natural TTS powered by Sonic. Requires an API key and internet.
cartesia.apiKeyDescription: Your API key is stored locally and never shared.

elevenlabs.title: ElevenLabs
elevenlabs.description: Cloud: Premium AI voice synthesis with emotional range and 1000+ voices.
elevenlabs.apiKeyDescription: Your API key is stored locally and never shared.

openai.title: OpenAI
openai.description: Cloud: High-quality natural voices via the OpenAI API. Requires an API key.
openai.apiKeyDescription: Your API key is stored locally and never shared.

google.title: Google Gemini
google.description: Cloud: Native audio generation from the Gemini TTS preview models.
google.apiKeyDescription: Your Google AI Studio API key, stored locally and never shared.

microsoft.title: Microsoft AI
microsoft.description: Cloud: Microsoft MAI-Voice / Azure speech endpoint. Requires an endpoint and API key.
microsoft.apiKeyDescription: Your Azure / Foundry API key, stored locally and never shared.
microsoft.endpointDescription: Your Azure AI Foundry / deployment endpoint URL.

kitten.title: Kitten TTS
kitten.description: Local: Ultra-lightweight TTS (25-80MB) with 8 natural voices. CPU ONNX, no GPU.

piper.title: Piper TTS
piper.description: Local: Fast, lightweight neural TTS with many English voices. Fully offline.

kokoro.title: Kokoro TTS
kokoro.description: Local: High-quality offline TTS with natural voices and broad accent coverage.

pocket.title: Pocket TTS
pocket.description: Local: Compact offline TTS engine with straightforward CLI voice selection.

chatterbox.title: Chatterbox
chatterbox.description: Local: Open-source zero-shot TTS with emotion control from Resemble AI (~2GB).

http.title: HTTP Server
http.description: Call any local or remote HTTP TTS endpoint (OpenAI-compatible or custom).
http.note: HTTP servers are configured per profile. Create or edit a profile to set the URL, method, headers, body template, voice, and response format.

setup.uvMissing: uv is required to install local engines. Install it once to enable every local engine.
setup.profilesHint: Voice, model and per-engine knobs live in Profiles. This page only holds credentials and engine setup.

error.loadDescription: An error occurred while loading your engine configuration.

play.title: Play
play.placeholder: Type or paste text to generate.

history.title: History
history.deleteBatchDescription: This will permanently delete all fragments in this batch and their audio files. This action cannot be undone.
history.deleteEntryWithFile: This will permanently delete the history entry and its audio file. This action cannot be undone.
history.deleteEntryOnly: This will permanently delete the history entry. This action cannot be undone.

success.installerLaunched: Kitten TTS installer launched in a new window

info.httpEngineRemoved: HTTP engine has been removed. Switched to Local engine.

welcome.title: Welcome to CopySpeak
welcome.subtitle: Configure your text-to-speech engine to get started, or skip and set it up later.

onboarding.engineDescription: Set up your TTS engine. You can change this later in the Engine tab.

recommendation.title: We recommend Kitten TTS to get started
recommendation.description: Kitten TTS is a new ultra-lightweight TTS engine (25-80MB) that runs on CPU without requiring a GPU. Click the button below to install it automatically — no manual setup needed.

onboarding.helpText: You can always configure your engine later from the Engine tab.

effects.title: Audio Effects
effects.description: Apply a post-processing effect to TTS playback. Effects are applied in real time and do not modify saved audio.
effects.activeTooltip: The effect applied to every TTS playback. Switch instantly without restarting.

hero.title: CopySpeak
hero.subtitle: AI text-to-speech for your clipboard
hero.description: A lightweight Windows app that reads clipboard text aloud using AI text-to-speech engines.

doubleCopy.title: Double-Copy Trigger
doubleCopy.description: Copy text twice within 1.5 seconds to trigger speech instantly. No hotkeys needed.

engines.title: 5 TTS Engines
engines.description: Choose from Kitten TTS, Piper, Kokoro, OpenAI, or ElevenLabs. Local and cloud options.

hud.title: HUD Overlay
hud.description: Floating heads-up display with real-time waveform visualization during playback.

history.title: History
history.description: Persistent TTS generation history with playback, batch management, and audio export.

sanitization.title: Text Sanitization
sanitization.description: Automatic markdown stripping, URL expansion, and text normalization for clearer speech.

configurable.title: Highly Configurable
configurable.description: Playback speed, volume, pitch, triggers, appearance, and more. Dark and light themes.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: See CopySpeak in action
screenshots.caption: CopySpeak v0.1.4 — Main interface with Play tab

footer.madeWith: Made with Rust, Svelte, and AI.
